data.title: Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit; AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors and detects abnormal activities to prevent breaches.
data.technical_spec: ML-driven solutions for anomaly detection; custom threat intelligence systems.

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Multifactor authentication to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Support for 2FA using SMS and authentication apps.

data.title: Data Breach Protocols
data.description: Defined procedures for handling data breaches and user notifications.
data.technical_spec: Incident response teams with automated security alerts.

data.title: API Security
data.description: Secure API endpoints to prevent misuse and data leaks.
data.technical_spec: OAuth 2.0 for secure API requests; rate limiting applied.
